chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.334 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.4369/2023 (U/A). 2. For orders on CMA No.4370/2023 (U/O-23 R-1 CPC). 3. For hearing of CMA No.1271/2023 (U/O-1 R-10 CPC). 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For hearing of CMA No.3299/2023 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 16.10.2023 Mr. Arsal Rahat, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Faisal Mehmood Ghani, Advocate for respondent No.1..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1) Urgency granted. 2) In a suit for declaration that concerns with the internal policies and for giving effect to the promotion credentials of the appellant, issues were framed and ultimately it was dismissed. Aggrieved of it, the employee/plaintiff filed this Appeal which is pending; however, it seems that by virtue of CMA No.4370/2023 some consensus reached amicably out of the Court. This understanding is not the adjudication of the Court and it is an independent understanding of the parties that is employer and employee that they have reached. We do not see it beyond the frame of understanding reached between the master and servant and there is no element of adjudication involved, hence in view of the above, the parties are at liberty to engage themselves into said understanding as recorded and reproduced in the application and/or as they deem fit and proper since it is out of court settlement. With this understanding, the Appeal stands disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
